textByHashes.f27a1f5d971c528252010b27979b2abe1474e5e1: Please feel free to look around, just try to keep your hands off the apparatus!
textByHashes.914165bf536f4b89611b95e1a28a209826649d99: I'm trying to carry out very important research, but these so-called 'wizards' from the eastern lands keep meddling with my equipment.
